channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Pakistan to Lead OIC Ministerial Conference on Women's Empowerment
item.description: Pakistan is set to host the Organisation of Islamic Cooperation's (OIC) 9th Ministerial Conference on Women from July 12-13, focusing on the socio-economic and political empowerment of women across OI...

item.title: Beaconsfield Pool Enhances Accessibility for All
item.description: The Beaconsfield pool, a beloved summer destination since 1967, has recently completed significant accessibility upgrades to ensure inclusivity for individuals with reduced mobility. The $100,000 proj...

item.title: Government warns against fake agricultural inputs and fertiliser smuggling
item.description: The Tanzanian government has issued stern warnings to traders selling substandard agricultural inputs and those smuggling subsidised fertiliser to neighbouring countries, stating that such practices c...

item.title: England's Kane recounts golf meeting with Trump during World Cup preparations
item.description: England's Harry Kane shared details about his golf encounter with former US President Donald Trump during a media session ahead of the FIFA World Cup 2026 quarter-final against Norway. The meeting, wh...

item.title: BJP announces candidate changes for Bihar and Madhya Pradesh bypolls
item.description: The BJP has made two surprise candidate announcements for upcoming assembly bypolls, replacing its nominee in Bihar’s Bankipur seat and choosing a new face over senior leader Narottam Mishra in Madhya...

item.title: Christopher Nolan's 'The Odyssey' Premieres in Mumbai with Global Release on July 17
item.description: Christopher Nolan's highly anticipated adaptation of Homer's 'Odyssey' premiered in Mumbai on July 10, ahead of its global release on July 17. The film, shot across Morocco, Greece, Italy, Iceland, Sc...

item.title: Twenty One Pilots Deliver High-Energy Performance at Mad Cool Festival
item.description: The article details Twenty One Pilots' electrifying headline performance at the Mad Cool festival in Spain, following the country's World Cup victory. The band, known for their alt-rock innovation, de...

item.title: Belgium's World Cup Campaign and Key Players
item.description: The article discusses Belgium's performance in the 2026 FIFA World Cup, highlighting their strategic approach and standout players. Despite initial challenges, Belgium has progressed through the group...

item.title: NDLEA arrests drug baron and Mexicans over N480bn meth lab
item.description: The National Drug Law Enforcement Agency (NDLEA) has arraigned a 63-year-old drug baron, Anochili Innocent, three Mexican nationals, and six other Nigerians for drug-related offences. The suspects wer...

item.title: Non-Invasive Ultrasound Treatment Offers Hope for Twins with Rare Pregnancy Condition
item.description: A groundbreaking procedure using high-powered ultrasound waves has shown promise in treating twin-to-twin transfusion syndrome (TTTS), a rare condition affecting identical twins. This non-invasive met...

item.title: Universities face scrutiny over handling antisemitism amid royal commission inquiry
item.description: Senior officials from five major Australian universities—the University of Sydney, University of NSW, University of Melbourne, Monash University, and Australian National University—are set to appear i...

item.title: Spain Confident Ahead Of World Cup Semi-final Clash With France
item.description: Lamine Yamal, the Barcelona winger who starred in Spain's 2-1 win over Belgium, has vowed that his team will enter the 2026 FIFA World Cup semi-final against France without fear. The match, set to tak...

item.title: Delta Community Chairman and Two Others Arrested Over Public Flogging Incident in Emevor
item.description: A community chairman in Delta State, Nigeria, and two others have been arrested over an incident where a resident was publicly humiliated and flogged. The incident occurred in Emevor after Godspower O...

item.title: Trump's Failed Attempts to Fix Broken Scenarios
item.description: The article chronicles Donald Trump's disastrous week marked by multiple failures that undermine his claims of being able to 'fix' any situation. Trump's interference in a World Cup match led to a U.S...

item.title: A Reflection on a Landscaping Mistake and Its Lasting Impact
item.description: The article recounts a personal experience of a homeowner who hired a landscaping service that mistakenly planted invasive bamboo in their backyard, leading to a persistent and costly problem. Despite...

item.title: Kenya Railways Warns Against Fraudulent Ticket Booking Schemes
item.description: Kenya Railways has issued a public warning to passengers about fraudulent ticket booking schemes targeting Madaraka Express travelers. The corporation urges passengers to use only official booking cha...

item.title: India's Health Survey Highlights Declines in Maternal Mortality and Spousal Violence
item.description: India's 6th National Family Health Survey (NFHS-6), conducted across 715 districts between 2023-2024, reveals significant improvements in public health and socio-economic indicators. The survey highli...

item.title: Zanzibar Launches Nationwide Campaign to Protect Children from Cybercrime
item.description: The Zanzibar government has launched a comprehensive nationwide campaign to shield children from online dangers, responding to growing concerns about the exposure of young internet users to harmful di...

item.title: Trump's Influence Over Venezuela Through Rubio's Control
item.description: The article details how U.S. President Donald Trump's influence over Venezuela extends through his close ally, Secretary of State Marco Rubio. Despite claims from Trump's aides that his comments about...

item.title: South Africa Urges Enhanced Border Security Investment to Curb Migration Challenges
item.description: The Portfolio Committee on Home Affairs has emphasized the critical need for sustained investment in South Africa's border security infrastructure to address the persistent 'deportation and repatriati...
